name: Food & Beverage
description: Models for quick-service and sit-down restaurants, commercial kitchens, drive-thru operations, and food-retail activities. (The walkthrough originally used 'Food Service' verbatim but has been updated to the canonical 'Food & Beverage' per the canonical domain seed.)

name: Retail
description: Consumer-facing retail operations including storefront queuing, checkout, and fulfillment.

name: Queue Management
description: Cross-cutting domain for any system whose central modeling question is queue formation, wait time, and throughput — applies broadly across industries. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme.

name: Service Operations
description: Cross-cutting domain for service-oriented queueing and resource-contention models that serve customers through finite-capacity resources, independent of a specific industry. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme.
